creator: rotkap@gmx.de
text:
cd /usr/ports/german/libreoffice/ && make install brings up


/bin/sh ../../libtool --tag=CXX   --mode=link c++  -O2 -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing -Werror -no-undefined  -o libcmis-0.2.la -rpath /usr/local/lib  session-factory.lo atom-document.lo atom-folder.lo atom-object.lo atom-session.lo atom-utils.lo -L/usr/local/lib -lxml2 -lz -L/usr/local/lib -liconv -lm -L/usr/local/lib -lcurl -rpath=/usr/lib:/usr/local/lib -lssl -lcrypto -lz  
libtool: link: c++ -shared -nostdlib /usr/lib/crti.o /usr/lib/crtbeginS.o  .libs/session-factory.o .libs/atom-document.o .libs/atom-folder.o .libs/atom-object.o .libs/atom-session.o .libs/atom-utils.o   -Wl,-rpath -Wl,/usr/local/lib -Wl,-rpath -Wl,/usr/local/lib -L/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libxml2.so /usr/local/lib/libiconv.so /usr/local/lib/libcurl.so -lssl -lcrypto -lz -L/usr/lib -lstdc++ -lm -lc -lgcc_s /usr/lib/crtendS.o /usr/lib/crtn.o    -Wl,-soname -Wl,libcmis-0.2.so.0 -o .libs/libcmis-0.2.so.0
libtool: link: (cd ".libs" && rm -f "libcmis-0.2.so" && ln -s "libcmis-0.2.so.0" "libcmis-0.2.so")
libtool: link: (cd ".libs" && rm -f "libcmis-0.2.so" && ln -s "libcmis-0.2.so.0" "libcmis-0.2.so")
libtool: link: ar cru .libs/libcmis-0.2.a  session-factory.o atom-document.o atom-folder.o atom-object.o atom-session.o atom-utils.o
libtool: link: ranlib .libs/libcmis-0.2.a
libtool: link: ( cd ".libs" && rm -f "libcmis-0.2.la" && ln -s "../libcmis-0.2.la" "libcmis-0.2.la" )
